summary: Tested FinRomania 2.0 — Portofoliu BVB PRO (Faza 1). All 24 backend tests passed (100%). All 12 required frontend scenarios verified. Backend CRUD + auth guard + CSV export fully functional with real EODHD data. Frontend: paywall, PRO dashboard, Add dialog, RSI badges, TOTAL row, sidebar link — all working correctly. One minor HTML hydration warning fixed.

cannot be descendant of

. Caused React hydration warning in console.

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/portfolio-bvb/ with PRO token → 200, response has positions + summary
✅ Summary fields: total_value, total_invested, pl_ron, pl_percent, today_pl, positions_count
✅ Position fields: symbol, shares, purchase_price, current_price, pl_ron, pl_percent, rsi, rsi_signal
✅ TLV persisted in portfolio after add
✅ SNP removed from portfolio after delete
✅ Frontend: Non-logged-in user sees 'Autentificare necesară' on /portfolio-bvb
✅ Frontend: Free user sees ProPaywall with 'Upgrade la PRO' button
✅ Frontend: PRO user sees 'Portofoliu BVB PRO' dashboard with 4 summary metric cards
✅ Frontend: Add dialog has all fields: portfolio-symbol-input, portfolio-shares-input, portfolio-price-input, portfolio-save-btn
✅ Frontend: RSI badges colored correctly — RID=AMBER, FAV=GREEN
✅ Frontend: TOTAL row in tfoot shows correct sum (H2O 7390 + BRD 5600 = 12990 RON)
✅ Frontend: Sidebar CONTUL MEU section has 'Portofoliu BVB' link visible for logged-in PRO users
✅ Frontend: Delete confirmation dialog shows 'Elimini {symbol}?' with confirm-delete-btn

NOTE: Action buttons (Edit/Delete) in table rows use opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 — buttons only appear on hover. This is by design but may be unexpected on touch devices.
NOTE: RSI signals SUPRAVÂNDUT and SUPRACUMPĂRAT share same color logic — both green and red ends work correctly per spec.
OBSERVATION: EODHD live prices working correctly — H2O current price 147.80 RON, BRD 28.00 RON, TLV 35.90 RON fetched in real-time.
seed_data_creation: TLV and SNP positions created and deleted during tests. Portfolio left with H2O (50 shares @ 65 RON) and BRD (200 shares @ 15 RON) — pre-existing demo data.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
